title: Durable Due Scheduling, Clock Injection, Timers, Backoff, and Pause · Guided Contract Studio
summary: A disability-led research network incrementally builds durable handle-clean adaptive scheduler from original RSS, Atom, HTTP, PostgreSQL, and browser fixtures while retaining prior TypeScript, Node, HTTP-client, Express, SQL, Git, accessibility, security, testing, async-cleanup, and recovery requirements. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of durable handle-clean adaptive scheduler while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory…
objectives: Persist next attempt, last success, failure streak, publisher guidance, pause cause, and schedule reason outside process timers.
Inject clock and sleep ports, distinguish elapsed from civil time, define boundary equality, and test skew and jumps.
Schedule the next bounded timer only after ownership and settlement, unref deliberately, clear on close, and expose handle evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Feed aggregation and TypeScript Commit to the mission model · Workshop Feed Ts Persisted Due State
steps.instruction:
workshop case — A workshop TypeScript team handles case 4323 during a clean emitted-package and restore smoke. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to prove durable due state, injected clocks, non-overlapping timers, backoff, pause, and handle cleanup; the release claim must bind source, compiler, emitted JavaScript, migrations, lockfile, package, image, configuration, and restored state; then reorder one timer, Promise, claim, lease, fencing, worker, disconnect, or shutdown settlement and exclude stale effects. Browser TypeScript uses pure bounded models and original RSS, Atom, HTTP, PostgreSQL, and reader fixtures only. Real DNS, Fetch, streams, fast-xml-parser, Express, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, handle and load claims, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: Feed aggregation and TypeScript Commit to the mission model · Workshop Feed Ts Persisted Due State.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for persist next attempt, last success, failure streak, publisher guidance, pause cause, and schedule reason outside process timers. For Feed aggregation and TypeScript Commit to the mission model · Workshop Feed Ts Persisted Due State, keep Feed Ts Persisted Due State connected to executable TypeScript unknown-validation, async, PostgreSQL, Express, reader, package, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.
